scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @persistent/shared && npm run build --workspace @persistent/api && npm run build --workspace @persistent/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @persistent/shared && npm run build --workspace @persistent/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @persistent/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @persistent/web
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run prisma:validate --workspace @persistent/api
